reviews.review_description:
Great game and very addictive! I found it really frustrating though that you can't select which bow you use when you've got the upgrades.

Yes, an upgraded item in supposed to be better but when you get the final bow it shoots three arrows at a time. The problem being the centre arrow isn't accurate at all!! You just have to aim somewhere near the enemies and hope for the best. It really ruins what could be an awesome game.
I love this game

Words fail me when trying to praise this game. My favorite experience on the Gear VR store. Level and character design are top notch in a pixar-ish style. Physics of the projectiles seem to be spot on. I have yet to "finish" the game,but I can say you would be doing yourself a favor by downloading this. I would love to see more enemy types,different weapons,and of course different land types. I have many detailed ideas for this game.Love it! Get it now!
Occasionally the game glitches very badly.

reviews.review_title: Fun but has major graphical issues.
reviews.review_description: The game would look really good if it wasn't for the major pop in, sometimes the textures don't even manage to load and all you see is white. Another annoyance is when the enemies can shoot through trees and objects before you even see them. Another tech issue, but otherwise it's fun and has decent replayability with the upgrades of the bow and ship.

I jyst started the game by throwing arrow on go and game was frozen. I quit the game, came back to home screen still game music was there and i was able to open 360 images app. Game is super fun, all you need to do is fix this bug.
You guys are great..!!
Love it
Like ir a lot
Very good

Nothing to complain about for gameplay, fun and fairly challenging. The shooting feels very natural and the graphics are well done. However, though the description says over 100 levels, it's really just the same 3 or 4 locations with different enemy configurations. If more different levels and enemy types come along, I could be persuaded to give 5 stars.
It lags so bad. It actually caused my track pad to stop working I had to completely restart it...
Great for kids too
It wouls be nice if there was more to it, like running around the ship fixing and watvhing your charecter health etc or more environments
Clean graphics. Relaxing.

reviews.review_title: Free Game Better Than Some Paid Ones!
reviews.review_description: The game is pretty good. Graphics are decent, slightly 3D, could be a bit more 3D though. The game is just pure fun, despite minor flaws. You can upgrade your balloon ship and bow by earning credits. Only one song, could be 1 or 2 more.  Bit for a free game, its fun to shoot the bow. Well done. You can use your BT joystick that came with CE2 to shoot with... without raising your arm up.

I still play this, sad that they don't even try to update games in the Go, I have a bad back and this headset was truly made for people who can't move much but who still want to enjoy vr games without all the motion that has to be used on the newer head set.
Cool
This game is so amazing .when you upgrade your bow it's amazing. It is a singer player game mode and it is so amazing.
free game,not worth $4.99
Lots of fun!  Thank you for adding controller support :)
